response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies, but lacks the depth of AI/ML expertise, entrepreneurial leadership, and 15 years of focused industry experience required for a Principal Engineer role in AI strategy.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source GIS platforms
Proven ability to optimize systems (e.g., low-latency services, pricing strategies)
concerns: No advanced degree in AI/ML or demonstrated expertise in building AI-powered products
Limited evidence of strategic leadership or entrepreneurial experience in large organizations
Career spans 18 years but lacks consistent focus on cloud/AI domains
